response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in full-stack development with TypeScript and various technologies, but the seniority level is higher than required and some skills don't directly match the job requirements.
strengths: Proficient in TypeScript and full-stack development
Experience with various technologies and frameworks
concerns: Seniority level is higher than required for the position
Some skills mentioned don't directly match the job requirements
Not clear if the candidate is willing to work on a junior/mid-level position
